questions.scenario: The team wants Azure SQL to appear as a private IP inside the VNet. Which feature provides that shape?

options.text: Private endpoint backed by Private Link.

questions.explanation: A private endpoint places a private network interface in the VNet for one target resource.

questions.scenario: What is a service endpoint better described as?

options.text: A lighter network allow path from a subnet to an Azure service, without creating a private IP for one resource.
A DNS record type for ownership validation.

questions.explanation: A service endpoint changes the network path from a subnet to an Azure service. It does not create a private endpoint resource or replace permissions.

questions.scenario: Which checks still matter after private access is configured?

options.text: The app resolves the expected private name.
The resource firewall or network allow rules permit the path.
The app identity has permission if the service checks identity.
The database becomes public so external clients can test it.

questions.explanation: Private networking is one part of access. DNS, service firewalls, and identity checks can still block the app.
